rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 6/10 and rest on the same job-relevant concerns: no RAG/vector database/multi-agent framework experience, Python absent from skills, and limited evidence of large-scale cloud AI architecture. The wording differs (the variant adds a 'screening conversation' suggestion and reorganizes the cloud-platform concern), but these are within ordinary run-to-run variation and key off the resume's actual technical content, not the city change from Berlin to Bucharest. No score change, no new concern, and no shifted reasoning ties to the relocation.
